title: Global markets react with volatility to Trump's tariffs and tensions in Iran
summary: Uncertainty over the trade war and the conflict in the Middle East leads to mixed movements in the stock markets of Asia, Europe and the United States.

title: Oil exceeds $100 driven by geopolitical escalation in the Middle East
summary: Houthi attacks on Saudi ships and the US response send oil soaring and trigger a massive sell-off in global bonds.

title: Heavy selling in the technology sector drags down global stock markets
summary: Fear of a sector slowdown hits major tech companies and chipmakers, with declines on Wall Street and in Europe.

title: The European Central Bank unveils new designs for euro banknotes
summary: Future banknotes will feature motifs such as Beethoven, Cervantes and a bird, according to the proposals revealed by the ECB.

title: Banco Sabadell posts profit of 971 million in first half and announces share buyback
summary: Despite the year-on-year decline in net profit, the bank launches a buyback program worth 331 million euros.

title: Securitas shares fall despite second-quarter net profit beating expectations
summary: Investors show disappointment with the future outlook of the Swedish security company.

title: SpaceX records stock performance below that of most IPOs since 2009
summary: Elon Musk's space company faces negative forecasts that place it behind competitors such as Planet Labs.

title: Ibex 35 rises 0.75% and recovers the 19,400-point level
summary: The Spanish index relies on corporate results and closes the session at 19,409 points.

title: ECB keeps interest rates at 2.25% and anticipates a hike in September
summary: The monetary authority indicates that inflation remains a concern, while the market adjusts its expectations.
